stories.headline: ‘We are going make a tonne of money’: US Senator Graham on US war on Iran
stories.description: The veteran GOP senator appears to suggest that the war on Iran was launched to gain control over its oil supplies.

stories.headline: Volunteers rebuild Sudan’s oldest psychiatric hospital destroyed by war
stories.description: Sudanese family returning home from displacement, struggles to help son overcome drug addiction.

stories.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 10 of US-Israel attacks?
stories.description: Mojtaba Khamenei has been selected as Iran’s new supreme leader. Attacks continue and oil prices have spiked.

stories.headline: Calls for boost in mother and baby units after woman sent 90 miles for care
stories.description: Four days after giving birth, Lizzy Berryman's psychosis forced her to be taken from York to Derby for specialist care.

stories.headline: Bangladesh shuts universities, limits fuel sale as Iran war causes shortage
stories.description: Bangladesh relies on imports for 95 percent of energy needs which have been disrupted after conflict in the Middle East.
